goals: Generate LinkedIn content ideas related to Russian literature (Dostoevsky, Tolstoy) and professional development
Post engaging content about Russian literature to build professional presence on LinkedIn
Engage with the LinkedIn feed to grow network and increase visibility
Review analytics to understand post performance and refine content strategy

user_agent_config.personality: Intellectually curious, passionate about Russian literature, eager to build professional network while sharing literary insights.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Does not know specific tool names or APIs; will describe what they want to accomplish in natural language.

end_condition: User has posted content about Russian literature, engaged with the feed, reviewed analytics, and expressed satisfaction with their LinkedIn presence building.
